description_long: This sconce features a sleek, minimalist design with three arms radiating outward from a central cylindrical hub, each ending in a circular light fixture. The arms are evenly spaced and extend horizontally, while the central hub is attached to a vertical rod that connects to a round ceiling mount. The overall structure is composed of metallic materials, giving it a polished, modern appearance. The light fixtures at the end of each arm are simple discs, likely housing LED bulbs, and lack any ornate detailing. The finish is smooth and reflective, contributing to its contemporary aesthetic. This fixture is designed to be mounted on the ceiling, providing ambient lighting in urban interiors or covered outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, metallic ceiling sconce with three evenly spaced arms, each ending in a circular light fixture. The design is sleek, minimalist, and highly reflective.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three arms and circular light fixtures radiating from the central hub.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the vertical rod and the depth of the arms extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view with two arms visible and the central hub partially obscured.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the vertical rod and arm arrangement from the other side.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and a polished metallic finish. Its geometric arrangement and lack of ornamentation emphasize contemporary style.
